case_title: ERASMO ULLOA VS. EDDIE HERIBERTO HERRERA, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA HERRERA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ULLOA, ERASMO AS TO DEFENDANT EDDIE HERIBERTO HERRERA, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA HERRERA JANITORAL SERVICES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
